user.description: Enter your PoolCop API key from the PoolCopilot account

flow_rates.description:
Your pool pump has {pump_speeds} speeds. Configure the flow rates for each speed.

Pool volume: {vol} m³
Detected flow rate: {flowrate} m³/h

reauth_confirm.description: Your PoolCopilot API key is no longer valid. Please enter a new API key.

init.description: Adjust the flow rate for each pump speed. These values are used to calculate filtration volume.
